title: Prince William Shares a Special Photo for Mother's Day
summary: Prince William shared a new photo of himself and his mother, Princess Diana, for Mother's Day. The picture was taken in 1984 when William was two years old, and they are sitting in a field of wildflowers at their home called Highgrove. William posted this on Instagram to remember his mother, who died in 1997. He also thought about other people who miss their moms on this day. The Royal Family shared more photos for Mother's Day, including ones of the late Queen and other family members. This shows how families remember and honor their mothers.

background_read: Mother's Day is a holiday to honor mothers and show love. Princess Diana was a famous princess who died in a car crash when her sons were young. Prince William is her older son and often talks about missing her. The Royal Family includes kings, queens, and princes who share messages on special days. Photos help people remember happy times with their families.
Article_Structure: WHO: Prince William and Princess Diana
WHAT: Sharing a photo for Mother's Day to remember Diana
WHERE: At Highgrove, their home in Gloucestershire
WHY: To honor mothers and think of those who miss them

perspectives.description: William uses the photo to keep his mother's memory alive and connect with others who have lost loved ones.
